reviews.comment:
Fuimos almorzar para el 25 de mayo
Muy serviciales las chicas del lugar muy bue menú, lugar acogedor. Y un excelente descuento para socios

(Translated by Google)
We went for lunch on May 25th. The staff were very helpful, the menu was very good, and the place was cozy. They also offered an excellent discount for members.
